title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.
Show more

title: Walk in Drive For MBA/ Mcom Freshers (Finance) on 22nd April-Bangalore
description:
Greeting from Infosys BPM Ltd.,




We are hiring the candidates from MBA / M.com (Finance) Fresher for Capital Market (Securities Ops, Wealth and Asset Management Ops, Exposure to financial Instruments & Financial markets) domain for Bangalore location.




Please walk-in for interview on 22nd Apr 2026 at Bangalore Location.




Note: Please carry copy of this email to the venue and make sure you register your application before attending the walk-in.







Please use below link to apply and register your application.

https://career.infosys.com/jobdesc?jobReferenceCode=PROGEN-EXTERNAL- 243673




Please mention the generated Candidate ID on the top corner of your Resume ***




Interview details:

Interview Date: 22nd Apr 2026

Interview Time: 10:00 AM to 12:30 PM IST ONLY




Interview Venue:

Bangalore, E-City Phase-2, Infosys Limited, No. 40/P-41/P, Gate: 2, Electronic City phase 2, Industrial Area, Konappana Agrahara, Bangalore-560100.

Landmark: In Between Sunik Industries and Tejas Networks.




Please find below Job Details for your reference:




Designation: Senior Process Executive

Job Level: 2A

Experience: Freshers Only- 0 yrs

Shifts: Flexible to work for any shift

Notice Period - Immediate Joiners only

Work Location: Bangalore (Work from Office)

Qualification: Full Time Graduation - UG (BCom/BBA); Year of Passing - 2022; 2023 and

Full Time Post Graduation - PG (MCom/MBA (Finance)); Year of Passing - 2024; 2025




Note:

Post Graduation (MBA/Mcom) and Under Graduation (B.Com/BBA) is a must from (Finance) background.
Candidate should have all original marksheets and PDC of both UG and PG degree will be permitted.
Candidates waiting for final results are not eligible
Pursuing Candidates are not eligible




JOB DESCRIPTION:




Senior Process Executive




This role requires ability to perform Qualitative and Quantitative Research and good Analytical skills to interpret and make sense of data/ information in hand.
Understand client query and their requirements.
Perform Root Cause Analysis and Process Improvements




Key Responsibilities




Responsible for handling customer request meeting all the SLAs (TAT, productivity, and Quality).
Active participation in team building activities.
Adaptability in learning newer technologies and changing business needs. Collaborates with the teams to bring in process improvements or ideas.
All 5 days work from Office.
Ability to Understand process knowledge quickly and efficiently.
Able to interpret financial statements and a deep understanding of finance and accounting principles and procedures, with a passion for financial markets.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills are necessary to interact with clients and internal stakeholders and explain complex financial concepts.
The ability to be highly organized and have a rigorous attention to detail is critical for ensuring data accuracy.
Time-bound and meticulous.
Capacity to function autonomously in a demanding setting.
The capacity to identify problems, understand their root causes, and propose effective solutions is a key requirement.
Must be able to analyze and interpret the data/numbers.




To qualify for the role, you must have:




Bachelor's Degree (Finance or Accounting preferred): BCom/BBA
Master's Degree (Finance or Accounting preferred): MCom/MBA (Finance)




Skills Required




Good analytical and communication skills.
Basic knowledge in MS office




Documents to Carry:

Carry a printout your updated resume.
Carry any 2 photo Identity proof (PAN Card/Driving License/Voters ID card/Passport).
All original education documents needs to be available for verification. (10th, 12th, Graduation (Sem Wise Marksheet, CMM. Provisional and Original Degree).




Mandatory to Carry:

Smartphone with good front camera, charger and Headset for Assessment, Government ID proof Hardcopy.




Pointers to note:

Please do not carry laptops/cameras to the venue as these will not be allowed due to security restrictions.
Original Government ID card is must for Security Clearance




Regards,

Infosys BPM Recruitment team

title: Chartered Accountant (Fresher)
description:
We are looking for dynamic CA Freshers to join Ola’s Finance team across multiple verticals such as FP&A, Controllership, Business Finance, and Taxation. The role offers exposure to end-to-end finance operations, business partnering, financial management, and cross-functional collaboration in a fast-paced environment.




Key Responsibilities:

Support budgeting, forecasting, and monthly financial performance analysis.
Conduct variance analysis and assist in preparing management reporting decks.
Perform accounting activities including reconciliations, journal entries, and month-end close tasks.
Assist in audit preparation, documentation, and compliance activities.
Partner with business teams to analyse costs, revenue, profitability, and operational efficiencies.
Support financial modelling, scenario planning, and KPI tracking.
Assist in treasury operations such as cash flow management, banking coordination, and investment documentation.
Conduct process reviews, identify gaps, and support internal audit activities.
Prepare data packs, dashboards, and analysis for leadership decision-making.
Work with cross-functional teams to support strategic and operational finance initiatives.




Key Requirements:

Chartered Accountant (CA) – recently qualified
Strong understanding of financial statements, accounting concepts, and Ind-AS.
Proficiency in MIS reporting, Excel (advanced functions), and large dataset analysis.
Working knowledge of ERP systems and finance tools preferred.
Good communication and stakeholder management skills.
High attention to detail with strong problem-solving ability.
Ability to adapt to a fast-paced environment and take ownership of tasks.

title: Graduate
description:
Overview

WELCOME TO SITA

We're the team that keeps airports moving, airlines flying smoothly, and borders open. Our tech and communication breakthroughs are the foundation of the global air travel industry.

You'll find us at 95% of international hubs. We partner closely with over 2,500 transportation and government clients, each with their own unique needs and challenges. Our goal is to find fresh solutions and cutting-edge tech to make their operations run like clockwork. Want to be a part of something big?

Are you ready to love your job? The adventure begins right here, with you, at SITA.

About The Role & Team

SITA India is on the lookout for recent graduates to join our SkyStar Program within the Procurement function, initially for a 12-month period, with the potential for a permanent role.

Role

Your main tasks will involve supporting the manufacturing procurement and the sourcing specialists and provide supporting data and MI to create more informed procurements as well as play a hands-on role in direct sourcing activity, obtaining quotes, supporting RFx`s and E Sourcing initiatives, providing assistance under supervision of the Manufacturing Procurement lead, and ensuring the smooth operation of procurement. This entry-level opportunity offers a chance to dive into various activities within our fast-paced global community:


Connecting with Diverse Individuals: Collaborate locally and globally.
Building Skills for Your Career: Develop essential skills tailored to your job stream.
Joining Corporate Projects: Contribute to projects shaping the future of our industry.


Early career talent is our future, and we're thrilled to have you join impactful missions alongside our experts, gaining valuable experiences. We can't wait to witness the incredible things you'll accomplish with us!

Empowered People, Reinventing Travel

What You’ll Do


Support Operative Project Procurement by assisting in day‑to‑day purchasing activities for ongoing projects, including data preparation, order follow‑up, supplier coordination, and documentation management
Collaborate with project managers and engineering teams to ensure materials and services are procured in line with project timelines, specifications, and quality requirements.
Follow up with suppliers on project‑critical deliveries, order confirmations, documentation requests, and issue resolution to support smooth project execution.
Support procurement transformation initiatives, contributing to process improvements, digital tools adoption, standardization, and increased operational efficiency within the Procurement team.
Ensure compliance with internal procurement policies, documentation standards, and approval workflows while maintaining accurate records.


Qualifications

KNOWLEDGE & SKILLS


Strong analytical skills with attention to detail
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
Ability to learn quickly and work in a dynamic team environment
High level of motivation, curiosity, and willingness to take initiative
Basic understanding of procurement, supply chain, or manufacturing processes
Knowledge of e‑sourcing tools or ERP platforms


Education & Qualifications


Bachelor’s degree in supply chain management, Business Administration, Engineering, Commerce, or a related field.


What We Offer

We're all about diversity. We operate in 200 countries and speak 60 different languages and cultures. We're really proud of our inclusive environment. Our offices are comfortable and fun places to work, and we make sure you get to work from home too. Find out what it's like to join our team and take a step closer to your best life ever.

🏡 Flex Week: Work from home up to 2 days/week (depending on your team's needs)

⏰ Flex Day: Make your workday suit your life and plans.

🌎 Flex-Location: Take up to 30 days a year to work from any location in the world.

🌿 Employee Wellbeing: We have got you covered with our Employee Assistance Program (EAP), for you and your dependents 24/7, 365 days/year. We also offer Champion Health - a personalized platform that supports a range of wellbeing needs.

🚀 Professional Development: At SITA, we believe growth fuels innovation. Our learning ecosystem offers access to world-class platforms and programs designed to help you thrive. From LinkedIn Learning, Microsoft's Enterprise Skills Initiative, and Airport Council International -available to all employees-to specialized solutions like Pluralsight for technology upskilling, Harvard Business Publishing for people leadership, Stanford for strategic development and many others, we align learning opportunities with your Development Plan and our business priorities. Your development journey is supported every step of the way.

🙌 Competitive Benefits: Competitive benefits that make sense with both your local market and employment status.

SITA is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We value a diverse workforce. In support of our Employment Equity Program, we encourage women, aboriginal people, members of visible minorities, and/or persons with disabilities to apply and self-identify in the application process.

title: Hiring Junior Medical Coder Fresher Nursing and Physiotherapist
description:
Job Description
Position: Medical Coder


HR KAVIYA -9087738811(whatsapp)

Medical Coding is the process of converting patient health information into alpha numeric codes. Coders take medial reports from doINTors, which may include a patients condition, the doINTors diagnosis, a prescription, and whatever procedures the doINTor or healthcare provider performed on the patient, and turn that intoa set of codes, which make up a crucial part of the medical claim.

title: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee
description:
Position: Fresher- Recruitment Trainee

Locations: Bangalore

Job Type: Full Time

Work Type: Onsite

Shift Timing: Night Shifts

Timing: 6:30 PM to 3:30 AM IST (Monday to Friday)

Transportation: Both Pick and Drop




Overview




TekWissen Group is a workforce management provider throughout India and many other countries in the world.




Job Description:




We are hiring passionate and motivated fresh graduates who are eager to build a career in US IT Recruitment.
As a US IT Recruiter, you will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and submitting potential candidates for various IT positions with our clients in the United States.
You will work closely with Account Managers and delivery leads to understand client requirements and ensure timely and quality submissions.
This is a full-time onsite position designed to train and mold freshers into skilled recruitment professionals in the highly dynamic US staffing industry.

Responsibilities:

Understanding Client Requirements (IT or Non-IT)
Regularly interact with Account Managers and Team Leads to get complete clarity on job requirements.
Understand the technical and functional aspects of each job role (skills, experience level, domain, and location).
Prioritize open requisitions based on urgency and importance.

Candidate Sourcing & Screening:

Use various sourcing channels such as job portals (Dice, Monster, CareerBuilder, etc.), LinkedIn, internal databases, networking, and referrals.
Perform keyword searches and Boolean searches to identify suitable profiles.
Screen candidates through phone/video interviews to evaluate communication skills, technical capabilities, availability, and salary expectations.
Ensure a high level of candidate quality before submission.

Resume Submission & Coordination:

Format and present resumes professionally before sharing with the Account Manager or client.
Maintain a quick turnaround time for candidate submissions to meet tight deadlines.
Follow up regularly with candidates to ensure their availability and interest.
Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients; track feedback and results.

Recruitment Tools & Documentation:

Maintain accurate records of candidate details, job status, and communication history using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
Update internal databases and track candidate progress throughout the recruitment lifecycle.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Education: Bachelor's degree (Any discipline).
Excellent communication skills is a must (spoken and written English).
Strong interpersonal skills, positive attitude, and willingness to learn.
Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work in a fast-paced environment and Proficient in using MS Office tools.




TekWissen Group is an equal opportunity employer supporting workforce diversity.

title: Power Electronics Engineer (0-3 Years)
company: n Human Resources & Management Systems [ nHRMS ]
description:
Job Title: Power Electronics Engineer

Experience: 0–3 Years
Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Description:

We are looking for a motivated Power Electronics Engineer (Fresher) to support the design, development, testing, and validation of power electronic systems. The role is ideal for candidates with strong fundamentals and a keen interest in power conversion technologies.

Key Responsibilities:


Assist in the design and development of power electronics circuits such as inverters, converters, SMPS, and rectifiers

Support testing, debugging, and validation of power electronics hardware

Perform basic simulations using tools like MATLAB/Simulink, PSpice, LTspice

Assist in component selection (IGBTs, MOSFETs, diodes, capacitors, magnetics)

Work with senior engineers on PCB testing, thermal analysis, and efficiency improvement

Prepare technical documentation, test reports, and BOMs

Coordinate with cross-functional teams during development and testing phases



Requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:


BE/BTech/MTech in Electrical or Power Electronics

Strong fundamentals in Power Electronics, Analog Circuits, Control Systems

Basic knowledge of DC-DC converters, AC-DC converters, and inverters

Familiarity with simulation and testing tools

Understanding of basic lab instruments (DSO, power analyzer, multimeter)

Good analytical and problem-solving skills

Good to Have:


Internship or academic project in power electronics or EV systems

Exposure to EV powertrain, chargers, or renewable energy systems

Basic knowledge of micro controllers /DSPs



Benefits

Why Join Us:


Hands-on learning and mentorship

Opportunity to work on real-world power electronics applications

Career growth in EV, renewable energy, and power systems

title: Clinical Research Associate
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented fresher to join as a Clinical Research Associate (CRA). The candidate will assist in monitoring clinical trials, ensuring compliance with protocols, GCP guidelines, and regulatory requirements.

Key Responsibilities:

·      Assist in monitoring clinical trial sites and activities

·      Ensure accurate data collection and documentation

·      Support site initiation, monitoring, and close-out visits

·      Maintain trial master files (TMF) and study records

·      Coordinate with investigators and site staff

·      Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice (GCP) guidelines

·      Report deviations, adverse events, and study progress

Eligibility Criteria:

·      Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, or related field

·      Strong understanding of clinical research basics (preferred)

·      Good communication and documentation skills

·      Willingness to travel for site visits

title: GSA - Front Office
description:
Company Description

Strategically located in the heart of the IT corridor- Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road brings to you different categories of beautiful rooms that are sleek and contemporary designed, full of modern day amenities suitable for your stay. In proximity to numerous IT parks and corporate hubs notably- Ecospace Business Park, Prestige Techpark, Cessna Business Park, Salarpuria Techparks- Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road offers the perfect residence to travelers across the globe.

Nearby to corporate offices- JP Morgan, Accenture, Honeywell, Deloitte and many more along Sarjapur Road and Marathahalli, Novotel Bengaluru Outer Ring Road brings to you seamless benefits of hosting events and conferences in well-equipped meeting spaces. Bengaluru, besides the Silicon Valley of the country, is close to some of the most significant historical and leisure destinations in South India- Mysore, Coorg, Goa, Munnar, Ooty, Pondicherry to name a few among the long list of leisure destinations.

Job Description

A Front Office Associate typically handles administrative tasks and ensures smooth operations at the reception area of a business. Their responsibilities include:


Greeting Guests: Welcoming visitors and clients, ensuring a positive first impression.
Answering Calls: Managing incoming and outgoing calls professionally.
Scheduling: Booking appointments or reservations, and coordinating meeting rooms.
Administrative Support: Managing correspondence, filing, and basic clerical duties.
Customer Assistance: Addressing inquiries or directing visitors to the appropriate departments.
Record Management: Maintaining logs and records, like visitor details or appointments.
Cash Handling (if applicable): Processing payments or handling petty cash.


Qualifications


Education: Diploma Holder or Graduate in Hotel Management.
Experience: Fresher / 1–2 years as GSA
Skills: Excellent communication, interpersonal, and computer (PMS) skills.
Personality: Courteous, well-groomed, and guest-oriented.


Additional Information

What Is In It For You


Employee benefit card offering discounted rates in Accor worldwide for you and your family
Learning programs through our Academies designed to sharpen your skills
Ability to make a difference through our Corporate Social Responsibility activities, like Planet 21
Career development opportunities with national and international promotion opportunities.


Why work for Accor?


We are far more than a worldwide leader. We welcome you as you are and you can find a job and brand that matches your personality. We support you to grow and learn every day, making sure that work brings purpose to your life, so that during your journey with us, you can continue to explore Accor’s limitless possibilities. By joining Accor, every chapter of your story is yours to write and together we can imagine tomorrow's hospitality. Discover the life that awaits you at Accor, visit https://careers.accor.com/


Do what you love, care for the world, dare to challenge the status quo! #BELIMITLESS

title: Business Development Associate (MBA Fresher)
description:
Job Title: Business Development Associate (MBA Fresher)

Location: Remote

Company: OctaSence Technologies




About OctaSence:

OctaSence Technologies is an AI-powered deep-tech company focused on predictive infrastructure intelligence and structural health monitoring. We work at the intersection of AI, engineering, and real-world infrastructure to enable early risk detection and smarter decision-making.




Role Overview:

We are looking for a highly motivated Business Development Associate (MBA Fresher) to join our team. This role is ideal for candidates specializing in Marketing and Business Development who are eager to work in a fast-paced startup environment and contribute to building strategic partnerships and market expansion.




Key Responsibilities:




Identify and generate new business opportunities through research and outreach

Support lead generation, client acquisition, and partnership development

Assist in preparing proposals, presentations, and business documents

Coordinate with internal teams (tech, product, marketing) for alignment

Conduct market research and competitor analysis

Maintain CRM and track business development activities

Participate in client meetings, follow-ups, and relationship management




Requirements:




MBA (2025 or 2026 pass-out) with specialization in Marketing / Business Development

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Interest in B2B sales, consulting, or startup ecosystem

Basic understanding of business strategy and market research

Self-driven, proactive, and willing to learn




Preferred:




Freshers are welcome; internship or project experience in sales, business development, or marketing will be an added advantage

Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach, CRM tools, or lead generation is a plus




What We Offer:




Opportunity to work directly with the founding team

Exposure to deep-tech and AI-driven products

Remote working flexibility

Fast learning environment with high growth potential




How to Apply:

Interested candidates can apply via LinkedIn or send their resume to: rajasri@octasence.com

title: (Freshers) Business Development Associate [B2C] - Immediate Joiners
description:
Job Role: Business Development Associate

Note: We are currently looking for Immediate joiners

Experience: 0 to 2 years




At Ambitio, we’re building India's first AI-powered global admissions platform to help

students get into their dream schools. Our mission is to democratize access to quality

global education by making the admissions process 10x easier through personalized AI

guidance, combining advanced AI technology with alumni mentorship. We are backed by

notable investors including BLinC Invest, First Cheque, and We Founder Circle.

The Role







As a Business Development Associate, you are the first point of contact for ambitious

students and parents. Your role is not "selling," but diagnosing their profile, understanding

their dreams, and demonstrating how our technology and expertise can bridge the gap

between their current profile and a top-tier global admit.







Key Responsibilities:




● Strategic Outreach: Identify and engage with high-potential students, turning

cold interest into warm relationships.

● Profile Consultation: Conduct high-level consultations to understand a student’s

academic background and career goals.

● Logical Pitching: Use data and logic to explain the value proposition, showing why

our AI-driven approach is superior to traditional consultancy.

● Problem Solving: Use critical thinking to offer solutions for unique student

"bottlenecks" (e.g., low GRE, weak SOP, gap years) that align with Ambitio’s

offerings.

● Exceed Targets: Drive the end-to-end sales cycle from lead generation to

enrollment, ensuring high conversion through persistent follow-ups.







Requirements:




We are looking for individuals with:

● First-Principle Thinking: The ability to understand the "why" behind a student's

needs and reason through complex objections.

● Confidence & Presence: Comfort in speaking to high-achieving students and

parents as a knowledgeable advisor.

● Logical Reasoning: The ability to analyze data (admit rates, rankings) and weave it

into a compelling, logical narrative.

● High Agency: A self-starter mindset that takes ownership and finds creative ways

to solve problems and drive leads forward.

● Educational Background: B.B.A/B.COM/M.B.A







Why Ambitio?




● Fast-Track Growth: Join a high-growth startup where your impact is immediately

visible.

● Intellectual Environment: Work in a culture that values logic, data, and

"student-first" ethics over aggressive sales tactics.

● Competitive Rewards: Good base salary with uncapped incentives tied to your

performance.







Location: Sector 6, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560068

Job Type: Onsite (Tuesday to Sunday) [11am to 8pm]

Website: https://ambitio.club/




Show more

title: Hiring Fresher’s – Non-Voice Process – US Mortgage Title Search/Typing – Hyderabad
company: Orchestrate Mortgage and Title Solutions, LLC
description:
Job Title: Non Voice - Trainee/Process Executive – US Mortgage (Title Search/Typing)

Location: Hyderabad, India

Job Type: Full-Time | On-site

Experience Level: Freshers (0–3year experience)




Job Description:

We are looking for enthusiastic and detail-oriented fresher’s to join our team for a Non-Voice US Mortgage Process (Title Search/Typing). This is an excellent opportunity to kick-start your career in the mortgage industry with professional growth and learning opportunities.

Key Responsibilities:

Perform title search and data entry related to US mortgage documents.
Type and process mortgage documents with high accuracy and attention to detail.
Review and extract information from property records and legal documents.
Maintain data integrity and ensure timely delivery of reports.
Adhere to internal quality standards and SLA timelines.
Collaborate with team leads to resolve process-related issues.
Work in night shifts to support the US-based process.

Required Skills:

Basic knowledge of MS Office (Word, Excel).
Good typing speed (minimum 30-35 WPM) with high accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and ability to spot errors.
Good analytical and comprehension skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Willingness to work in night shifts (US timings).




Eligibility Criteria:

Educational Qualification: Any Graduate (preferably B.Com, BBA, BA, B.Sc, etc.) No LLB.
Experience: Fresher’s are welcome. Prior experience in mortgage process is a plus.
Location Preference: Candidates must be from or willing to relocate to Hyderabad.

Work Schedule:

Shift: Night Shift (US Time Zone).
Working Days: 5 Days a Week (Saturday & Sunday off).




Salary & Benefits:

Competitive salary as per industry standards.
Performance-based incentives.
Health insurance and other benefits.
Training and career development opportunities.

title: Immediate Joiners - Business Development Associate (Freshers)
description:
At Ambitio, we’re building India's first AI-powered global admissions platform to help

students get into their dream schools. Our mission is to democratize access to quality

global education by making the admissions process 10x easier through personalized AI

guidance, combining advanced AI technology with alumni mentorship. We are backed by

notable investors including BLinC Invest, First Cheque, and We Founder Circle.

The Role




As a Business Development Associate, you are the first point of contact for ambitious

students and parents. Your role is not "selling," but diagnosing their profile, understanding

their dreams, and demonstrating how our technology and expertise can bridge the gap

between their current profile and a top-tier global admit.







Key Responsibilities:




● Strategic Outreach: Identify and engage with high-potential students, turning

cold interest into warm relationships.

● Profile Consultation: Conduct high-level consultations to understand a student’s

academic background and career goals.

● Logical Pitching: Use data and logic to explain the value proposition, showing why

our AI-driven approach is superior to traditional consultancy.

● Problem Solving: Use critical thinking to offer solutions for unique student

"bottlenecks" (e.g., low GRE, weak SOP, gap years) that align with Ambitio’s

offerings.

● Exceed Targets: Drive the end-to-end sales cycle from lead generation to

enrollment, ensuring high conversion through persistent follow-ups.







Requirements:




We are looking for individuals with:

● First-Principle Thinking: The ability to understand the "why" behind a student's

needs and reason through complex objections.

● Confidence & Presence: Comfort in speaking to high-achieving students and

parents as a knowledgeable advisor.

● Logical Reasoning: The ability to analyze data (admit rates, rankings) and weave it

into a compelling, logical narrative.

● High Agency: A self-starter mindset that takes ownership and finds creative ways

to solve problems and drive leads forward.

● Educational Background: B.B.A/B.COM/M.B.A







Why Ambitio?




● Fast-Track Growth: Join a high-growth startup where your impact is immediately

visible.

● Intellectual Environment: Work in a culture that values logic, data, and

"student-first" ethics over aggressive sales tactics.

● Competitive Rewards: Good base salary with uncapped incentives tied to your

performance.










Location: Sector 6, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560068

Job Type: Onsite (Tuesday to Sunday) [11am to 8pm]

Website: https://ambitio.club/

Show more

title: Centralized Study Spec I
description:
Summary Of Responsibilities


Manage clinical systems.
Manage study documents and support eTMF management.
Maintain study databases (CTMS, IWRS, EDC, etc.)
Track and follow up with CRAs for outstanding issues.
Support in generating the study specific reports.
Manage internal/external communications.
Assist in ensuring training compliance for study teams.
Assist in study payments (Site and Vendor).
Data Review:
Follow up with CRA for resolution of the outstanding issues/action items related to assigned tasks.
Perform Associate Lead/Lead role for assigned projects.
Draft and send study specific reports as per the study team instructions.
Collaborate with DM, Programming team for reports and communication of data related tasks.
Perform any other data review related tasks as per the project team instructions.
Study Support:
Generate Study Reports and perform analysis.
Perform Access management on applicable study systems.
Perform study system set up on new awarded studies.
CTMS compliance management.
Manage project communications.
Assist project teams for other study support activities.
Investigator Payments:
Review EDC, Contract, and mark line items “Ready to Pay/Screen Failure” in CTMS
Work with PA to generate cover letter or Proforma invoice and payment batch generation in CTMS.
Perform Invoice QC and Prepare GIA as applicable.
Coordinate with CTL, PM for line-item approvals and GIA approvals.
Process Out of Pocket and Pass-Through Expense Invoices.
Perform payment reconciliation during the study close out or on ad hoc request by the study team.
Act as a mentor and provide training to new joiners in team.
Performing quality check of the work delivered by the team as a part of the QC process.
To follow all applicable departmental Standard Operating Procedures and Work Instructions:
To complete required trainings according to required timelines.
To complete day-to-day tasks ensuring quality and productivity.
To manage project and technical documentation in an appropriate manner.
To provide administrative and technical support to internal departments and teams as needed.
To perform checks to ensure quality of work completed.
To ensure timely escalation and issue resolution as needed.
To execute high quality, timely monitoring and reporting plan(s) including specialized monitoring requests for approved protocols.
To support implementation of new monitoring tools.
To track and report metrics as determined by management according to required timelines.
To proactively identify opportunities for process improvements and support the implementation of process improvement activities.
To support the implementation of tools internally to enhance deliverables.
Ability to mentor and train others.
To assist in the document management (including document template creation, collection, review, processing and tracking up to eTMF filing) for all documents in the scope of agreed processes/activities or within the scope of GSDM throughout the study duration.
To assist in the preparation of new investigator submission packages for site/regulatory submission.
To support study team for contracts and budgets activities for investigative sites.
To assist the study start-up teams with tasks required for site start up activities.
To review, Support, Manage or assist in Managing the site clinical trial contracts in accordance with defined processes and timelines.


Qualifications (Minimum Required)


University/College Degree (Life Science preferred), or certification in an allied health profession from an appropriate accredited institution (Ex. Nursing certification, Medical or laboratory technology) and 5-8 years of work.
Experience in clinical research, including a strong working knowledge of the ICH-GCP guidelines and all other applicable guidelines and regulations.
Fortrea may consider relevant and equivalent experience in lieu of educational requirements.


Experience (Minimum Required)


5-8 Years of experience in the job discipline.
0-5 Years of experience in other professional roles.
Other required work-related experiences:
Demonstrated ability to plan, prioritize, organize, and communicate effectively.
Demonstrated ability to pay attention to detail.
Strong interpersonal skills with ability to work well with others.
Ability to deliver consistent high quality of work.
Strong interpersonal skills.
Ability to Influence others.
Ability to facilitate meetings.
Ability to lead process improvement initiatives.


Preferred Qualifications Include


Candidate should be able to work in shifts if business demands for it.
May involve extensive use of computer and keyboard.


Learn more about our EEO & Accommodations request here.
Show more

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Trainee, Project Management to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 Standards


Qualifications

Diploma (DET) – Electrical/Mechanical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.
Show more

title: Intern -Content and Digital Marketing , Noida
description:
Digital Marketing Intern Entry-Level / Fresher

Position: Digital Marketing Internship

Location: On-site

Duration: 3 months

Type: Internship (5k stipend ) + PPO

About The Role

We are looking for an enthusiastic entry-level/fresher who is passionate about Digital Marketing Internship . No prior professional experience is required. This internship is designed to help you learn the fundamentals of content marketing while working on real projects that improve website traffic and search engine visibility.



Key Responsibilities


Write clear, engaging, and beginner-friendly content for blogs, websites, and social media
Learn and apply basic SEO techniques, including keyword placement and on-page optimization
Assist in keyword research and content topic research
Update and optimize existing website content under guidance
Write meta titles, meta descriptions, and basic website copy
Proofread and edit content for grammar, readability, and accuracy
Support the marketing team with content-related tasks and research
Track basic content performance with guidance from the team


Who Can Apply


Freshers, students, or recent graduates from any background with strong English writing skills
Basic understanding or interest in content writing and SEO (certifications are a plus, not mandatory)
Willingness to learn digital marketing tools and SEO best practices
Good research skills and attention to detail
Ability to follow guidelines and meet deadlines
Passion for writing and online marketing


Skills You Will Learn


Blog and website content writing
SEO fundamentals (keywords, search intent, on-page SEO)
Content research and optimization
Using tools like Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and keyword research tools
Content planning and strategy basics


What We Offer


Structured learning and mentorship
Hands-on experience with real-world projects
Opportunity to build a strong writing and SEO portfolio
Certificate and/or letter of recommendation upon completion
Potential full-time opportunity based on performance


This job is provided by Shine.com

About the Company




T&M Services Consultancy is a growing HR and recruitment firm specializing in talent acquisition, staffing solutions, and HR consulting services across multiple industries.




Job Summary




We are looking for a dynamic and enthusiastic HR Intern to join our team. This internship is an excellent opportunity for freshers to gain hands-on experience in recruitment and HR operations.




Key Responsibilities

Assist in end-to-end recruitment processes (sourcing, screening, scheduling interviews)

Screen resumes and shortlist candidates based on job requirements

Maintain candidate databases and update recruitment trackers

Support onboarding and documentation processes

Assist in HR operations and administrative tasks

Good communication and interpersonal skills

Positive attitude and willingness to learn

title: Architectural Intern
description:
If you are passionate about cities and think Everyday Urban Realm can be shaped by Architecture, then join our MAD(E)ness !




Positions OPEN this Summer for Interns & Fresher Architects !

Apply now at jobs@madeinmumbai.net




INTERNSHIP >

The Internship Program at MAD(E) IN MUMBAI offers an intense & multifaceted exposure to the discipline of Architecture/Urban Design and is conducted over a minimum period of 120 working days. During the course of the engagement, the interns shall be exposed to various aspects of the discipline that would help them grow as an Architect & a Professional. Upon completion of the internship, the students receive stipend and a completion letter.




FRESHER ARCHITECTS >

Junior Architects get to work through all phases of projects. Tasks include site visits, architectural design, technical drawings, rendering, physical model building and administrative coordination with various government agencies/ clients.




A Flair for Design, Love for Travel & Passion to Build is a MUST !

title: Digital Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description

Nextloop Technologies LLP specializes in developing innovative digital solutions across multiple domains, including Web Development, App Development, Software Development, AI/ML, Blockchain, AR/VR, Cloud, Edge Computing, Digital Marketing, and RPA. Established in 2020, the company serves clients in regions such as the USA, MENA, UK, and APAC, helping businesses transform ideas into scalable and secure technological solutions. With a dedicated team of passionate developers, engineers, and designers, Nextloop crafts tailored solutions that optimize operations and enhance digital presence while fostering collaboration and creativity. The company holds certifications such as ISO 9001, ISO 27001, and CMMI Level 3, underscoring its commitment to excellence and innovation in technology.




Job Summary

We are looking for an enthusiastic and creative Digital Marketing Associate (Fresher) to join our team. This role is ideal for someone starting their career in digital marketing who is eager to learn and contribute to online marketing campaigns, social media management, and content creation.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in executing digital marketing campaigns across social media, email, and web platforms

• Create and post content on platforms like LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook

• Support in making short videos/reels for marketing and branding purposes

• Help manage daily social media activities (posting, basic engagement, responding to comments/messages)

• Assist in basic SEO activities like keyword research and content optimization • Create simple creatives (posts, banners, presentations) using tools like Canva

• Track basic performance metrics (likes, reach, engagement) and help prepare reports 

 Support internal branding activities such as job postings and company updates

• Assist in organizing online events, webinars, or campaigns

• Stay updated with latest social media trends and digital marketing basics.




Required Skills

• Basic understanding of social media platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)

• Interest in content creation and digital marketing

• Basic knowledge of Canva or any design tool

• Good written and verbal communication skills

• Creative mindset and willingness to learn

• Basic understanding of SEO and online marketing (preferred but not mandatory) 




Preferred Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Mass Communication, or related field

• Certification or internship in Digital Marketing (added advantage) 




What We Offer

• Opportunity to learn and grow in digital marketing

• Hands-on exposure to real-time projects and campaigns • Supportive and collaborative work environment

title: Business Development Manager
description:
Job Title: Business Development Manager

Reports To: Director

Experience Required: Fresher to 3 years




We are looking for a driven and strategic Business Development Manager to accelerate our growth and strengthen our market presence. This role goes beyond basic lead generation—you will play a key role in identifying opportunities, managing external partners, and ensuring our products gain strong visibility across domestic and international markets.




Key Responsibilities

Identify new business opportunities through proactive outreach and market research
Manage the complete sales pipeline, from prospecting to qualified opportunities
Support international expansion by generating export leads and exploring new regions
Screen and assign inbound leads to the appropriate internal teams for quick follow-up
Oversee product listings across e-commerce and B2B platforms (e.g., Amazon, Alibaba, Indiamart)
Optimize listings with compelling descriptions, competitive pricing, and quality visuals
Coordinate with external marketing and social media agencies to ensure alignment with business goals
Review content plans, track engagement, and monitor lead generation performance
Evaluate agency effectiveness based on ROI, audience growth, and lead quality
Maintain accurate records and updates in CRM systems




Skills & Qualifications

0–3 years of experience in business development, sales, or related roles
Strong understanding of digital platforms and online marketplaces
Ability to manage external vendors or consultants effectively
Excellent communication, negotiation, and coordination skills
Highly organized with a data-driven and process-oriented mindset




This role is ideal for candidates who are proactive, analytical, and eager to contribute to business growth.

title: Sales Executive
description:
Job Title: Sales Executive (Fresher) – Affiliate Marketing




Location: Onsite – Sector 67, Gurgaon

Experience: 0–1 year (Freshers can apply)

Employment Type: Full-time




About the Role

We are looking for enthusiastic and driven freshers to join our Affiliate Marketing team as Sales Executives. This role involves connecting with potential partners, onboarding affiliates, and contributing to revenue growth through performance-based marketing campaigns.




Key Responsibilities

Identify and reach out to potential affiliates, publishers, and partners
Pitch company offerings and onboard new affiliates
Build and maintain strong relationships with existing partners
Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth campaign execution
Monitor campaign performance and share regular updates
Negotiate deals and commission structures with affiliates
Stay updated with industry trends and competitor activities




Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in any field (Marketing/Business preferred)
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Basic understanding of sales or digital marketing is a plus
Highly motivated with a willingness to learn
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Good negotiation and persuasion skills




What We Offer

Hands-on experience in affiliate and performance marketing
Learning and growth opportunities in a fast-growing industry
Supportive and collaborative work environment
Competitive salary + incentives




Work Mode

This is a full-time onsite role based in Sector 67, Gurgaon
Candidates must be available to work from the office
